::: {.theorem-imports}
from: foundations.qmd
use:
  - @def-reflexive
:::

::: {#thm-main-first .theorem .goal}
## First demo theorem

### Statement

The number one is equal to itself.

### Uses

- @def-reflexive

### Proof

Apply @def-reflexive.
:::

::: {#thm-main-second .theorem .goal}
## Second demo theorem

### Statement

The number two is equal to itself.

### Proof

:::
